stories.headline: US Stocks Drift as Traders Weigh Latest Iran Peace Deal Reports
stories.summary: US stocks shuffled between gains and losses on Wednesday, as strategists lifted their S&P 500 year-end targets following a strong earnings season and traders weighed a potential peace deal to end the Iran war.
